title: Retail Salespersons
description: Sell merchandise, such as furniture, motor vehicles, appliances, or apparel to consumers.

tasks.text: Greet customers and ascertain what each customer wants or needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend, select, and help locate or obtain merchandise based on customer needs and desires.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute sales prices, total purchases, and receive and process cash or credit payment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare merchandise for purchase or rental.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer questions regarding the store and its merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge of current sales and promotions, policies regarding payment and exchanges, and security practices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate use or operation of merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Describe merchandise and explain use, operation, and care of merchandise to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Ticket, arrange, and display merchandise to promote sales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inventory stock and requisition new stock.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Exchange merchandise for customers and accept returns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Watch for and recognize security risks and thefts and know how to prevent or handle these situations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place special orders or call other stores to find desired items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean shelves, counters, and tables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records related to sales.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Open and close cash registers, performing tasks such as counting money, separating charge slips, coupons, and vouchers, balancing cash drawers, and making deposits.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare sales slips or sales contracts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Estimate and quote trade-in allowances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bag or package purchases and wrap gifts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Help customers try on or fit merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sell or arrange for delivery, insurance, financing, or service contracts for merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Estimate quantity and cost of merchandise required, such as paint or floor covering.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Rent merchandise to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Estimate cost of repair or alteration of merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
